title: PowderSnowEntityTag
description:
Added two tags about entity boarding the boat and
boots walking through the powder snow
body:
Two new tags:
powdersnowentitytag:no_boat
powdersnowentitytag:powder_snow


The former makes it impossible for your entity to board the ship again, while the latter gives your boots the same effect as leather boots

This mod was developed specifically for my modpacks
